title: Aptiv (APTV) Is Up 25.7% After Deepening NVIDIA Edge AI Partnership – Has The Bull Case Changed?
sentences: Aptiv (APTV) Is Up 25.7% After Deepening NVIDIA Edge AI Partnership – Has The Bull Case Changed?

On 2 June 2026, Aptiv PLC announced an expanded collaboration with NVIDIA to evolve Jetson platforms, including next-generation Jetson Thor, into commercially supported, production-ready edge AI systems with long-term security, lifecycle management, and Linux support across industries such as industrial automation, robotics, aerospace and defense, automotive, and telecommunications.
A distinctive element of this announcement is Aptiv’s plan to provide Cyber Resilience Act ready Yocto...
